chapters.text: Paul, Pathen soh, tonsot hinna a kinema, Pathen lhen ho ginchat lama chule Pathen ngaisahna thutah hetna lama Jesu Christa solchah chu,
chuche tonsot hinna chu jou sei theilou Pathen chun tonsot tonsot masanga atepsa ahitai;
ahinla aphatcha athu chu kihil lhanga kiphongdoh ahi; eihuhhinguva Pathen thupeh dungjuiya chuche hil lhangna chu eikichinsah ahitai;
tahsan lhang thudol’a kachatah tah Titus henga; Pa Pathen le eihuhhinguva Christa Jesua konin lungset le lungmon lhung hen.
Thil kibol bulhing lou chengse chu naboltup soh keiya chule khopi tinchenga upa ho napansah ding, hiche dinga chu Crete a kadalhah nahi.
Mi chu koi hile nolna bei, numei khatseh jia neiya, chule achate chu Pathen tahsan hia chon chatvaina lam le thua nun louna lama seiset changlou hiding ahi.
Ajeh chu iham itile Houbung lamkai chu Pathen gou chinga ahijeh a chu nolna bei hi dingdol ahi; kichamsah, lungsabai, jua lop, midenga, alam louva phatchomna ding ngaitoa kilose mi hilouva,
jindot them, phat ngailua lung limgeh, chondih, atheng, ama chang kitimthei mi bou hi ding ahi;
chule thu hilpha kicheh a chu mi thu hil athema, mi nelkal hatte ho athemmonau alansan theina dinga thu kihil dungjuiya ginchat umtah thu chu kolchah mi bou hi ding ahi.
Thua nung louva thu motseile duha pan mi tamtah aume, ahideh a chu cheptan ho lah ami ahiuve;
amaho chu akamu huh bing ding ahi; alam louva phatchomna ding gutnan ahildollouhel’u thu ahil’un, mi kimkhat insung achoh chavaitauve.
Amaho thudol mi themgao khat’in ahiti seiye, ‘Crete miho chu a-imatih chan a jou jing, sahang ahiuvin, thasea anneh hat ahiuve,’ ati.
Hiche hettohsahna hi adih tah mong ahi. Chuti ahijeh chun amaho tahsan kicheh mi ahina dingun natah-in phohsal’in;
thutah a kona mi heimanga Juda miho moh thusim le miho thupeh a lunglut dau hen.
Atheng dinga ima jouse thengsoh ahi, ahin akisuboh atahsanlou ho ding vanga athenga khatcha umlou ahi, thentah sanga alungu le ase apha hetnau agoma bohjia ahi.
Pathen kahei, tin akam sungun aseidoh nauvin, anatoh lama ajanom pouve; amaho chu thet umtah, thu ngailou ahiuvin, thilpha bolna lama pannabei ahiuve.
Nangma vangin thuhilpha kicheh chutoh kitoh thu seiyin;
upaho chu kitim thei, ja umtah, lunglim tah, chule ngailutna le ginchat chule lung dehat kicheh tah mi ahi theina dingun, hil’in;
chutima chun nupi tehseho jong chu mi ja um gingkhen hiu hen, mi hehse hat le lengpitwi tamtah sohnu hilouva, thilpha lama mihil hiu hen;
chutia chu amaho chun nutil khangdong ho chu a-inneipu te chengu ngailut le achateu ngailutje kisinsah-u hen;
alung limgeh, chon theng tah, inmun natong mi ahiuva, mihepi them ahiuva, a-inneipu te chengu noiya vah asosah theiyuva, chutia chu Pathen thu chu taitoma aum louna dingin hil’in.
Chutobangma chun gol-lhang ho chu lung limgeh cha aumna dingun tilkhouvin;
imalam jousea amahon thilpha bolna lama vettoh a ajui dingun umin; nathuhil’a chun nakitahje ja naumje, thusei kichehje musah-in,
seiset oimoa a umlou nadingin chutia chu akaleh lama panga chu ichunguva thuse sei ding neilouva ajachat theina dingin.
Soh ho chu apakaiho chengu thu noiya aumna dingu le imalam jousea amaho lung lhaina lama aumna dingun tilkhouvin; nelkal louhel hiuhen;
imacha akiseldoh nei louvin tahsanpha nei tin cheng musah hiuhen; chutia chu imalam jousea eihuhhinguva Pathen thuhil chu ajemhoi theina dingun.
Ajeh chu Pathen milungset hung kilah a mijouse huhhingna chu ahinlhut ahitai;
hitia chu eiho Pathen ngaisah louna le vannoi leiset lung ngaichat jouse pumpaiya, lung lima chondih a chule Pathen ngaisahna neiya tu khanga hi ikhosah dingu ahi.
chule kinepna thanop umtah chule Pathen len chungnung le eihuhhinguva Jesu Christa loupina hung kilah dinga chu kat jinga ium dingu ahi chu, eihil’u ahitai;
chonphat louna jousea kona aman apeh a eiho eilhatdoh theina dingu le ama a hidinga thilpha bol’a tompan mi vaikhat ama dinga akisuh theng theina dinga, ama chu eiho dinga ama kipedoh ahitai.
Nangman thu hicheng hi seiyin thunei kimkei tah-in tilkhouvin phohsal’in; koima cha kinahsah mosah hih hel’in.
Nangman amaho chu vaipoho le thunei ho thu noiya um dingin, sei ngaiya thua nung dingin, thilpha bollam jousea kigosadema um dingin,
chule mi koima seise louhel’a, mi koima setna hol louva, chon nema, mi jouse chunga nun nema chon dingin jong hilphan.

Ajeh chu eiho jong masanga chu lungthimbei, sei ngailou, thua nunglou, lhep chah, lung ngaichat le nomsahna tamtah soh anahia kimit thip le kithangset toa uma, hot hattah a khat le khat kihotoa inahiu ahi.
Ahinla eihuhhinguva Pathen mihepi le mihem angailutna ahung kilahdoh phat hin,
eihon eiho chama ibol’u chonphat thilbol vanga hilouvin, aman amilungset dungjuiya penthahna a asil’a, Lhagao Thenga athah sema,
eihuhhinguva Jesu Christa a kona ichunguva let set tah a asunlhah a eihuhhingu ahi;
hichu amilungset vanga them changa iuma tonsot hin kemlou kinepna dungjuiya gouloa eikisem theina dingu ahi.

Hiche thu kiseiya hi ginchat umtah ahi. Chule nangman hiti thu dol’a hin thu akichetje chu seiyin; Pathen tahsan ho chun thilpha bollama makai jing ding gelleu kalung ahi. Hiti ho hi miho dinga phat le phatchomna ahi.
Amavang ngol-hoi thudoh ho le khanggui thu kinel baotam, danthu dol’a kinah, hichenga kon chun nangma kihei mangin; hicheng chu phatchomna ahipoi, mohseh ahibouve.
Loitum bol mi chu khatvei nivei nahil chah kal’in la ta hih-in;
hitobang mi chu lamvaiya chule chonsejia ahi, ti nahei, ama le ama themlou kichan ahi.
Keiman naheng lama Artemas hile Tychicus hile kahinsola ahile, Nicopolis a kahenga hung dingin hung kihabol’in; chukoma chu phalbi sungsea um ding kagellhuh ahitai.
Dan thusun Zenas le Apollos ima alhahsam lhon louna dingin, lungthim themtah-in hinlhadoh-in.
Imiteu jong chu aboithoi louna ding le thil ngaichat lhahsam louna dinga, thilpha bolna a amakai theina dingu kisinu hen.
Kaumpi chengsen abonchauvin nasalamui. Ginchatna a eingailu ho chengse salamin. Nabonchauva chunga lungsetna um hen.
